pageTitle: D-Day Counter - Free Countdown to Any Date | GetNiftyKit
metaDescription: Enter a target date and instantly see the D-Day count in big numbers. Track exams, trips, anniversaries, and more, all saved right in your browser.
softwareAppDescription: A free web tool that counts down to any target date and displays it as a D-Day number, with support for tracking multiple goals at once.
subtitle: Enter a target date and instantly see the D-Day count in big numbers
taglineExtra: Exams, trips, anniversaries — track as many goals as you want, all in one place.
emptyMessage: No goals yet — add your first one above.
infoIntroP: D-Day Counter is a tool that shows how many days remain until a date you choose, displayed as a large, easy-to-read number like D-5, D-DAY, or D+3. Whether you're tracking an exam, a trip, a wedding anniversary, or a project deadline, you can keep several dates in view at once, and every goal you add is saved in your browser so it's still there the next time you visit.
infoHowtoP: Enter a goal name and date, then click "Add" — a new card appears in the list showing the D-Day count calculated from today. Add as many goals as you like, and remove any you no longer need with the "Delete" button. Everything is saved in this browser, so your goals will still be there the next time you come back.
infoUseCases: Tracking how much time is left before an exam, interview, or presentation
Counting down to a trip or event
Keeping track of anniversaries and birthdays so you never miss one
Managing multiple project or assignment deadlines at a glance

faq.a: Only in this browser's local storage on this device. Nothing is sent to a server, and your goals won't appear on other devices or browsers.

faq.q: Can I add a date that's already passed?
faq.a: Yes. If you add a past date, it will show how many days have passed, like D+3.
It's calculated from midnight today to the target date, counting whole days rather than hours — so if your goal is tomorrow, it shows D-1 no matter what time of day you check.

privacyNote: This tool stores your goals only in this browser's local storage. Nothing is sent to a server.
